ddls:
CREATE TABLE "stock_prices" (
  "price_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stock price record */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock the price record belongs to */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the stock price record */,
  "open" REAL /* Opening price of the stock on the given date */,
  "high" REAL /* Highest price of the stock on the given date */,
  "low" REAL /* Lowest price of the stock on the given date */,
  "close" REAL /* Closing price of the stock on the given date */,
  "adj_close" REAL /* Adjusted closing price of the stock on the given date */,
  "volume" INTEGER /* Trading volume of the stock on the given date */,
  "log_ret_adj_close" REAL /* Log return of the adjusted closing price */,
  "market_cap" REAL /* Market capitalization of the stock on the given date */,
  "pe_ratio" REAL /* Price-to-earnings ratio on the given date */,
  "dividend_yield" REAL /* Dividend yield on the given date */,
  "volume_weighted_price" REAL /* Volume-weighted average price (VWAP) on the given date */,
  "change_percent" REAL /* Percentage change in the stock price from the previous day */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("price_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stock_prices_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stocks" (
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stock */,
  "stock_symbol" TEXT /* Symbol of the stock (e.g., AAPL, GOOG) */,
  "stock_name" TEXT /* Name of the stock */,
  "industry" TEXT /* Industry the stock belongs to (e.g., Technology, Finance) */,
  "sector" TEXT /* Sector the stock belongs to (e.g., Software, Banking) */,
  "stock_type" TEXT /* Type of stock (e.g., common stock, preferred stock) */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency in which the stock is traded */,
  "market_value" REAL /* Current market value of the stock */,
  "ipo_date" TEXT /* Initial public offering date */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date and time when the stock data was last updated */,
  "exchange_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock exchange where the stock is traded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stock_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stocks_exchange_id FOREIGN KEY ("exchange_id") REFERENCES stock_exchanges ("exchange_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stock_exchanges" (
  "exchange_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stock exchange */,
  "exchange_name" TEXT /* Name of the stock exchange (e.g., NASDAQ, NYSE) */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the stock exchange (e.g., New York, London) */,
  "timezone" TEXT /* Timezone of the stock exchange */,
  "trading_hours" TEXT /* Trading hours in a specific format (e.g., 09:30-16:00) */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the exchange (e.g., open, closed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("exchange_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stock_exchange_lists" (
  "list_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stock exchange list */,
  "exchange_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock exchange the list belongs to */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock on the list */,
  "listing_date" TEXT /* Date when the stock was listed on the exchange */,
  "delisting_date" TEXT /* Date when the stock was delisted from the exchange (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("list_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stock_exchange_lists_exchange_id FOREIGN KEY ("exchange_id") REFERENCES stock_exchanges ("exchange_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stock_exchange_lists_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., analyst, trader, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for user authentication */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* User account status (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the stock */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the stock was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used for access */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the access session in seconds */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analyses" (
  "analysis_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analysis */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock being analyzed */,
  "analysis_date" TEXT /* Date when the analysis was performed */,
  "analysis_type" TEXT /* Type of analysis (e.g., technical, fundamental) */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the analysis */,
  "summary" TEXT /* Summary of the analysis */,
  "details" TEXT /* Detailed findings and insights from the analysis */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the analysis (e.g., in_progress, completed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analysis_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analyses_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analyses_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "industry_sectors" (
  "industry_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each industry */,
  "industry_name" TEXT /* Name of the industry */,
  "sector_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sector */,
  "sector_name" TEXT /* Name of the sector */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("industry_id", "sector_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., analyst, trader, admin) */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions assigned to the role (comma-separated) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "permission_name" TEXT /* Name of the permission (e.g., view_data, download_data) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the permission */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id")
)
